Set for hearing on Thursday, March 19, 2009, line 7, DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/OR IN THE ALTERNATE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Request to continue hearing denied, absent continuance of trial. Motion for summary judgment is granted. Objections to Burley and Ay declarations sustained. No triable issue of fact raised that plaintiff was exposed to defendant's products. =(302/CWW/JW)
